name: image_hash_anchor
description: Every refine pass must record the exact input image hash and output image hash.

name: identity_lock
description: Identity-sensitive passes require character_id, reference pack, and identity QA comparison.

name: pose_camera_lock
description: Refine output must remain within pose, body visibility, crop boundary, and camera-plan tolerance.

name: region_ownership
description: Masked passes may only materially change owned pixels/regions, plus approved feather edge.

name: engine_family_isolation
description: Bridge passes may only transfer images/masks/maps/manifests, never incompatible latents/models/CLIPs/LoRAs.

name: semantic_diff_limit
description: Unmasked semantic changes or new objects cause fail/rerun unless explicitly planned.

name: fallback_not_silent
description: Fallback from Flux/SDXL/Pony/SD1.5 must be explicit in the run manifest with reason and QA score.
